title: Comparative Epigenomics Reveals Host Diversity of the Trichinella Epigenomes and Their Effects on Differential Parasitism.
author: Feng Y Liu X Liu Y Tang B Bai X Li C Wang X Deng Y Gao F Liu M
content: S-EPMC8226246 PMC8226246 Comparative Epigenomics Reveals Host Diversity of the Trichinella Epigenomes and Their Effects on Differential Parasitism. Comparative epigenomics provides new insights on evolutionary biology in relation with complex interactions between species
